bundles.title: Baseline verification and barrel-equivalence test
bundles.goal: Confirm npm run check is green on current main and add or confirm barrel-equivalence smoke tests for task-planner, agent-session, and phase-router barrels.

tasks.title: Run npm run check on current branch and confirm green baseline
Check whether a barrel-equivalence smoke test already exists for task-planner, agent-session, and phase-router barrels
Add barrel-equivalence smoke test asserting exported keys of task-planner/index.ts, agent-session/index.ts, and phase-router/index.ts
Run npm run check and confirm the new test passes

bundles.title: Delete dormant bootstrap modules
bundles.goal: Remove ecosystem-detector.ts and profile-diff.ts which have zero production consumers and zero dedicated tests.

Verify profile-diff.ts has zero non-test, non-archived consumers via grep
Delete src/lib/ecosystem-detector.ts
Run npm run typecheck and confirm green
Delete src/lib/profile-diff.ts
Run npm run typecheck and confirm green

bundles.title: Verify spec delta for setup rerun requirement retirement
bundles.goal: Ensure the spec delta correctly retires the setup rerun diff-and-resolve requirement and openspec validate is green.

tasks.title: Confirm the spec delta contains the REMOVED Requirements block retiring the setup rerun requirement
Run openspec validate librefactoring --type change and confirm green

bundles.title: Merge completion.ts into window.ts
bundles.goal: Absorb the single-consumer completion.ts into window.ts, update barrel and test imports, keeping all exported symbols intact.

tasks.title: Move ArtifactChecker type and checkBundleCompletion function from completion.ts into window.ts, preserving exports
Delete src/lib/task-planner/completion.ts

Update src/tests/task-planner-core.test.ts imports to use ../lib/task-planner/window.js or the barrel
Run npm run check and confirm green including barrel-equivalence test

bundles.title: Merge send-queue.ts into session-manager.ts
bundles.goal: Absorb the single-consumer send-queue.ts into session-manager.ts, update barrel exports, keeping SendQueue symbol intact.

Delete src/lib/agent-session/send-queue.ts

bundles.title: Final verification and review handoff
bundles.goal: Run full verification suite after all changes and confirm all completion conditions are met.
